name: the-balanced-investor-club-for-claude
description: A thinking companion for the markets, inside Claude. A trading journal that records the thesis and the emotion at entry, a reverse DCF, an earnings-call reader, and real data on 13,000+ instruments. Educational content, not investment advice.

plugins.name: the-balanced-investor-club
plugins.displayName: The Balanced Investor Club for Claude
plugins.description: A trading journal that records the thesis and the emotion at entry, a reverse DCF, an earnings-call reader, and real market data on 13,000+ instruments. 26 skills, and not one of them issues a rating or a price target. Educational content, not investment advice.
